description: An event record in The Ptah Protocol. Where competition becomes history. A tournament, battle, gathering, or any occasion where people compete or convene inside a world.

main.description: A boxing match program combined with a history book entry. Before the fight it is a schedule. After the fight it is a permanent record. Ptah-Seker-Osiris — creation, shadow, rebirth. The event holds all three phases simultaneously.

worldReference.description: The AT URI of the world this event occurred in.

format.description: The competitive or structural format of the event.

participants.description: AT URIs of the character records participating. Not people — characters.

stakes.description: What is at risk or being contested.

status.description: The current phase of the event.

result.description: The outcome. Populated when status moves to completed.

witnesses.description: AT URIs of individual witness action records. Each witness action is a real record created by a real DID at a real timestamp. Witnessing is a verifiable technical contribution, not just a tally.

locationReference.description: The AT URI of the location where this event happened.

loreStatus.description: The narrative standing of this event in the world's timeline.

completedAt.description: Timestamp of when the event concluded.
